batch_1.failure_reason: Explore agent type lacks Write tool

notes: Two pages (event-sourcing-message-passing.md, diagrams.md) required re-dispatch in batch 2 after batch 1 Explore agents returned content-in-message instead of written files.
3 broken cross-links were auto-fixed post-generation: data-flow.md had 2 sibling-link path errors, overview.md had a CONTRIBUTING.md depth error.
Existing docs/architecture.md, README.md, and CLAUDE.md were preserved unchanged — wiki is purely additive.
Notable discrepancy surfaced: docs/architecture.md:53 says '5 topics' but src/exo/routing/topics.py:40-51 defines 6 (DOWNLOAD_COMMANDS is newer). Flagged in affected pages.
Notable finding: rust/networking does NOT implement RDMA/Thunderbolt protocols directly — it's incidental to transport selection, which lives in Python.
Notable finding: Dashboard polls /state every 1s; no SSE/WebSockets for state updates.
